title: Students Witness An Alien Craft In Melboure Australia
description: 4-6-66 MELBOURNE AUSTRALIA Late in the morning, students noticed an unusual object in the sky described as a metallic, saucer like craft. Witnesses consistently reported that the object appeared to descend at high speed before hovering just above [...]

title: Congressman Calls Death Of Air Force Whistleblower Planning To Reveal UFO Secrets ‘Suspicious’
description: A 12th person can now be added to the list of those with connections to secret U.S. research who have mysteriously gone missing or passed away. At least that is the stance Congressman Eric Burlison of Missouri is taking. title: White House’s alien website ramps up as world waits for Trump to share UFO files
description: UFO conspiracists are theorising that a change to a US Government website with the domain alien.gov may suggest that the so called UFO files are soon to be released
